infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs location access to track your bus route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs background location access to share your bus position with passengers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs location access to track your bus route for passengers.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow CityTransit Driver to use your location to track your bus route.
